summary: Comprehensive testing of Chroma Key Protocol after major UI overhaul. All backend APIs (20/20) and frontend features passing. App shell with sidebar, topbar, dashboard, onboarding, spin wheel, paywall modal all working correctly.

issues: Phase 1 screenshot shows Phase 2 content - animation timing may cause brief flash

passed_tests: Backend: API root endpoint accessible
Backend: User login with locked user (test2@demo.com)
Backend: User login with unlocked user (test@demo.com)
Backend: Invalid credentials rejected
Backend: Auth me without token returns 401
Backend: Auth me with session returns user data
Backend: GET /progress returns user progress
Backend: GET /reflections/{act} returns reflections
Backend: PUT /reflections updates reflection items
Backend: Journal CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Backend: Logout endpoint works
Backend: GET /license/status returns unlock status
Backend: POST /license/validate rejects invalid keys
Backend: POST /license/validate rejects used keys
Backend: POST /license/validate returns success for already unlocked users
Backend: POST /payments/checkout creates Stripe session
Backend: POST /payments/checkout blocked for unlocked users
Backend: POST /payments/checkout requires authentication
Backend: PUT /progress updates user progress
Frontend: Login page loads with cyber-noir design
Frontend: Dashboard loads with AppShell (sidebar + topbar)
Frontend: Sidebar navigation items present (Dashboard, Lyric Bank, Journal, The Wheel)
Frontend: 4 Protocol Acts displayed in sidebar with correct colors
Frontend: 4 Act cards displayed on dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard strip with Seeker Status, Current Stage, Reflection Log, Progress
Frontend: Action strip with Journal, Upgrade, Next Phase buttons
Frontend: Act I card navigates to /act/1
Frontend: Act II card navigates to /act/2
Frontend: Act III shows locked/blur overlay for locked users
Frontend: Act III click redirects to dashboard for locked users
Frontend: Act IV shows sealed/blur overlay
Frontend: Spin Wheel page loads with 30 segments
Frontend: Spin button works and shows result after spinning
Frontend: Paywall modal opens from dashboard Unlock action
Frontend: Paywall shows $14.99 Protocol License option
Frontend: Paywall shows Album Access Key input
Frontend: Invalid license key shows error message
Frontend: Paywall modal dismisses correctly
Frontend: Onboarding Phase 1 (Statement) with Begin button
Frontend: Onboarding Phase 2 shows 5 emotional states
Frontend: Onboarding Phase 3 shows two entry options (Enter Protocol + Spin Wheel)
Frontend: Enter Protocol navigates to dashboard
Frontend: Journal action button navigates to /journal
Frontend: Upgrade action button opens paywall modal
Frontend: Next Phase action button navigates to current act
Frontend: Logout button works and redirects to login
Frontend: Unlocked user can access Act III
critical_code_review_comments: Onboarding page calls POST /api/progress with emotional_state but backend only accepts PUT /progress - this causes 405 error (minor, doesn't break flow)
JWT key length warning in backend logs - consider using a 32+ byte secret key
seed_data_creation: Seeded test users (test@demo.com, test2@demo.com) and license keys in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major UI overhaul complete. AppShell layout with sidebar and topbar wraps all protected routes. Paywall modal triggered via ?showUnlock=true query param. All backend endpoints working. Test users and license keys seeded in database. Stripe integration uses sk_test_emergent through Emergent proxy.
